title: Mini cricket festival tomorrow
description: GEORGE NEWS - The annual KFC Provincial...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The annual KFC Provincial Festival of the Garden Route Badgers will take place on Saturday 20 April at Rooirivierrif. Registration will take place from 08:00 to 09:30.


> The official opening and welcoming will be at 09:50 and the first round of mini-cricket games will be played from 10:10.


According to the provincial KFC mini-cricket coordinator at SWD Cricket, Merlin Masimela, they are expecting 752 players from 57 schools on the day, with 162 coaches and volunteers accompanying the kids.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
